About this quiz

A study-and-test deck of 200 prominent, currently-active business leaders connected to India — from Reliance, Adani and Tata to startup founders and global Indian-origin CEOs.

Question types: photo → name, person → company, company → person, person → sector, and clue → person. Each set quiz mixes them and is freshly shuffled every time.

Photos and facts are sourced from Wikipedia / Wikimedia Commons. Net-worth rankings change constantly, so the deck focuses on stable facts (who leads which company, and in which industry).

Built as a study aid · photos & data from Wikipedia / Wikimedia Commons · rankings anchored to the Hurun India Rich List 2025.
